productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Grey Tops
description: Composition Slate grey top made of 70% cotton and 30% polyester, has a V-neck with a laced chest placket, half sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a curved hem with brand button on the left Fitting Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Hang dry in shade Cool iron Winter vacation's round the corner. So jet set and upgrade your wardrobe with the latest from the fall/winter collection of united colors of benetton. This cotton-polyester top is created to offer exemplary comfort and a flattering Fit, while you can pair it with jeans or capris and walking shoes or slip-ons for unparalleled comfort. Model statistics The model wears size M in tops Height: 5'7"; Chest: 33"
